case_title: FELDMAN, SAM VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISC (ATTN TRACI) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,407.71 FILED BY FELDMAN, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISC (ATTN TRACI) JMB CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
